name: Altar Familiar
abilityText:
Regenerator:
When my corpse is harvested, [<blood>1], and return me to a grave and I can't be harvested again until round end.

At round start, if I'm in a support lane, add one organ of any type.

name: Box of Limbs
abilityText: [<blood>2 while I'm in your hand]: Plot this creation. At round start, [bury me], reveal cards from the top of your deck until you reveal a creation, bury that creation, then put the rest on the bottom.

name: Cadaver Study
abilityText:
Plot this scheme. (In a grave or lane.)
At round start, if this scheme is plotted, [turn it to dust], and draw two cards.

name: Death's Invitation
abilityText: [Bury a creation from your hand]: A chosen creation's owner buries it if its might is less than or equal to 2 plus the number of corpses in your grave.

name: Follower of the Spiral
abilityText: When I enter, choose a creation type. Reveal cards from the top of your deck until you reveal a creation with the chosen type, draw that creation, then put the rest on the bottom.

name: Gloomtongue
abilityText: When one of your creations die in combat, you heal 1.

name: Graft
abilityText: Grant all original abilities and traits of one of your dusted creations without Sui Generis to a chosen creation.

name: Gravebind
abilityText: [Bury a creation from your hand]: A chosen creation can't attack until round end.

name: Graveswap
abilityText:
Return up to one creation from one of your graves to your hand, then either bury a creation from your hand or bury this scheme.
(Schemes can't be harvested.)

name: Jumpstart
abilityText: Put a creation from one of your graves onto a frontline lane, then that creation attacks you for damage equal to its cost minus 2.

name: Resupply
abilityText:
Plot this scheme. (In a grave or lane.)
At round start, if this scheme is plotted, [turn it to dust], and bury the top card of your corpse deck.

name: Scant Messenger
abilityText: When I enter, draw a card.

name: Ashes to Ashes
abilityText: Turn a chosen corpse or plotted card to dust. If a corpse was turned to dust this way, its owner may search their corpse deck for any Common Corpse card, bury it, then shuffle. Then you do the same. Corpses chosen this way can't be harvested until the chain resolves.

name: Colossal
abilityText: Until round end, give a chosen creation Colossal, then if it costs 5 or more, give it +5 vigor and add <blood>. (When you would take damage, you may have a creation with Colossal take that damage instead.)

name: Make a Stand
abilityText: Choose a scheme in the chain. If that scheme has chosen one of your creations, turn that scheme to dust unless its owner pays <blood>2. If they do, draw a card.

name: Ichor Concentrate
abilityText: Add <blood><blood><blood><blood>. Until round end, you can't play schemes.

name: Patchwork Envoy
abilityText:
When you harvest a corpse, add <blood><blood><blood> instead.
[<blood>3, bury a creation from your hand]:
Draw a card. This is a quick ability. Use only once each round.

name: Annihilator Titan
abilityText:
Colossal:
When you would take damage, you may have me take that damage instead.

When I attack normally, I can attack any frontline lane.
When I enter, if I usurped another creation, you may have me deal 10 damage to a chosen creation. If the usurped creation cost 5 or more, you may have me deal 5 damage to another chosen creation. Then, grant me one ability or trait from the usurped creation.

name: Goderek, Ersatz Titan
abilityText:
Sui Generis:
When I enter, reveal your deck, turn all of your cards with the same name as me to dust, then shuffle.

When I enter, two chosen lifestitchers reveal the top ten cards of their deck. Grant me all abilities and traits of five chosen cards revealed this way. Then each lifestitcher shuffles.

name: Sentry Titan
abilityText:
Colossal:
When you would take damage, you may have me take that damage instead.

Defiant:
When I'm chosen by an opposing scheme or ability, draw a card.

name: Triplex Titan
abilityText:
Regenerator:
When my corpse is harvested, [<blood>1], and return me to a grave and I can't be harvested again until round end.

Colossal:
When you would take damage, you may have me take that damage instead.

Defiant:
When I'm chosen by an opposing scheme or ability, draw a card.

name: Ambush
abilityText: Put a creation card from your hand onto the field, then all of your creations attack a chosen opposing creation. Bury the creation you put onto the field afterwards.

name: Gravesworn Brawler
abilityText:
When I enter, [bury a creation from your hand], and draw a card.
[<blood>1 while I'm in a frontline lane]: I attack a chosen creation for 4 damage, then bury me.

name: Rabid Hunt
abilityText: One of your creations attacks another chosen creation.

name: Sky Tyrant
abilityText:
Soaring:
When I attack normally, [halve my might rounded down until round end], and I deal that much damage directly to the defending lifestitcher.

Cadaverous Strength:
I get +1 might for every 2 might of the corpse in the grave behind me.

name: Venerable Alpha
abilityText:
Lord:
Your creations to my left and right each get +1 might and +1 vigor.

name: Wapiti
abilityText:
Shifty:
At the start of combat, you may move me by 1 lane in either direction.

name: Cornucopia Agent
abilityText:
Pristine:
When you harvest me, add one organ from my cost and one organ of any type.

When I enter the field or a grave, you may draw a card.
[<heart>1<blood>1]: Bury me from your hand.

name: Indomitable Forte
abilityText: Prevent the next 4 damage that would be dealt to a chosen creation.

name: Brain Blast
abilityText: You deal 3 damage to a chosen creation.

name: Cruel Ruin
abilityText: You deal 3 damage to each of up to 3 chosen creations. The opposing lifestitcher deals 3 damage to each of up to 3 creations of their choice.

name: Defense Engineer
abilityText:
Guardian:
I can't die until round end. When I die, you don't take overkill damage.

name: Defense Systems
abilityText:
Plot this scheme. (In a grave or lane.)
At the start of combat, if this scheme is plotted, [turn it to dust], and create a Barrier token with 0 might, 1 vigor, and Guardian on each open frontline lane.

name: Draw Upon the Well
abilityText: Look at the top five cards of your deck, draw three of them, then put the rest on the bottom. Bury this scheme in a grave. While this scheme is in a grave, it can be harvested for <brain><brain>.

name: Neuron Dealer
abilityText:
When you play a scheme, [it costs <brain> less to play], and grant me a debt counter. While you're in debt, your creations deal no damage when attacking normally. When I die, I attack you equal to your debt.
[<blood>1]: Remove a debt counter. This is a quick ability.

name: Sigma Falls
abilityText:
[Pay any amount of <blood>]:
Turn a chosen creation to dust unless its owner pays <blood>1 for each organ paid for this scheme's costs. (Including the initial cost of <brain>1<blood>1.)

name: The Amygdala
abilityText:
Neurotic Strength:
I get +1 might for every 4 of your nontoken dusted cards.

[Turn a card from your hand to dust]: Swap my might and vigor until round end. This is a quick ability. Use only once each round.

name: Warden of Lost Memories
abilityText: At the start of combat, [bury a scheme from your hand], and draw a card. Your schemes in graves can be harvested for <brain><brain>.

name: Thunderbolt Agent
abilityText:
Pristine:
When you harvest me, add one organ from my cost and one organ of any type.

When I enter the field or a grave, you may deal 2 dmaage to a chosen creation.
[<brain>1<blood>1]: Bury me from your hand.

name: Trawl the Minds
abilityText:
Plot this scheme. (In a grave or lane.)
At round start, if this scheme is plotted, [turn it to dust], and look at the top three cards of your deck, draw one of them, then put the rest on the top or bottom in any order.

name: Bearer of the Banner
abilityText:
Lord:
Your creations to my left and right each get +1 might and +1 vigor.

name: Divine Blessing
abilityText: Grant each of your creations +1 might and +1 vigor.

name: Entwined Shadows
abilityText: When I enter, create a Shadow token with 1 might and 1 vigor.

name: False Idol
abilityText:
Bolstered Strength:
I get the total might of each creation to my left and right that doesn't have Bolstered Strength.

name: Spirit Siphon
abilityText: Until round end, remove 2 might from a chosen creation, then give a chosen creation +2 might.

name: Summoning Circle
abilityText: Look at the top six cards of your deck. You may put any number of creations with total cost 4 or less from among them onto the field. Put the rest on the bottom.

name: Symbol of Violence
abilityText: At the start of combat, give a chosen creation +1 might until round end.

name: Tower Witch
abilityText: Vantage Point: While I'm in a support lane, I can attack normally. When I do, choose a frontline lane for me to attack.

name: Transient Malevolence
abilityText:
Ephemeral:
I turn to dust at round end.

name: Lightning in a Bottle
abilityText:
Blink:
I can be played as though I was a quick scheme.

When I enter opposing a creation, I deal 2 damage to the opposing lane. (I can damage support lanes.)

name: Reverie Agent
abilityText:
Pristine:
When you harvest me, add one organ from my cost and one organ of any type.

When I enter the field or a grave, you may grant a chosen creation +1 might and +1 vigor.
[<soul>1<blood>1]: Bury me from your hand.

name: Eminence
abilityText: Until round end, Give a chosen creation +1 vigor, and an additional +1 vigor for each of its traits.

name: Eye Collector
abilityText:
When I enter and at round start, [<eye>1], and I attack a chosen creation for 1 damage.
When I attack a creation, grant me all traits of that creation.

name: Eyeguy
abilityText:
Double Vision:
My normal attack instead attacks each opposing lane to the left and right of me.

name: Focus Lens
abilityText: One of your creations deals 2 damage to a chosen creation for each trait your creation has, plus an additional 1 damage for each trait among cards in your graves.

name: Grasp Possibility
abilityText: [Bury a creation from your hand, or turn a card from your hand to dust]: Draw two cards.

name: Nightgaze Colony
abilityText:
Soaring:
When we attack normally, [halve our might rounded down until round end], and we deal that much damage directly to the defending lifestitcher.

Double Vision:
Our normal attack instead attacks each opposing lane to the left and right of us.

name: Peer Through the Veil
abilityText: Look at the top five cards of your deck, draw one of them, plot a creation from among them, then turn the rest to dust. The plotted creation has "At round start, bury me." (It loses this text afterwards.)

name: Quantum Jester
abilityText:
Shifty:
At the start of combat, you may move me by 1 lane in either direction.

Ephemeral:
I turn to dust at round end.

name: The Myriad
abilityText: Aberrant Strength: I get +1 might for every 2 cards on all fields and in all graves.

name: The Singularity
abilityText:
As I enter, turn all of your other creations and corpses to dust, and grant me all original traits of everything turned to dust this way. Grant me +1 might and +1 vigor for each card turned to dust this way.
[<eye>2 while I'm in your hand]:
Put me onto the field.
This is a quick ability.

name: Vigil Horizon
abilityText:
Boundless:
At the start of combat, create a token in each lane to my left and right that have my exact stats and name. Those tokens have Ephemeral.

name: Old Thornback
abilityText:
Revolt:
You may have me attack last in combat. I get +1 might for every point of damage I've taken this round.

name: Revolt
abilityText: Give a chosen creation Revolt until round end, then you may deal 1 damage to that creation. (You may have a creation with Revolt attack last in combat. It gets +1 might for every point of damage it's taken this round.)

name: Hermit Carrionshell
abilityText: When you harvest a corpse, give me +1 vigor until round end when the current action ends.

name: Vitaleum Phalanx
abilityText:
When your creations attack, they deal damage equal to their vigor instead of their might.
When one of your creations enter, if it has greater vigor than might, look at the top card of your main or corpse deck, and you may put that card on the bottom.

name: Charismatic Orator
abilityText: When I enter, reveal cards from the top of your deck until you reveal a creation that costs 3 or less. If that creation has greater vigor than might, put it onto the field. Otherwise, put it into your hand.

name: Mass Retribution
abilityText: All creations deal damage to themselves equal to their might.

name: Ego Vitaleum
abilityText:
Sui Generis:
When I enter, reveal your deck, turn all of your cards with the same name as me to dust, then shuffle.

Damage is dealt to me in the form of permanently reducing my vigor.
When you harvest a corpse or play a meticulous scheme, grant me +2 vigor when the current action ends.
[Deal 2 damage to me]:
Draw a card, and you heal 1.

name: Stevens
abilityText:
Blink:
I can be played as though I was a quick scheme.

name: Blink
abilityText:
You may play a card from your hand as though it had Blink. It costs <brain><soul> less to play this way.
(Creations and schemes with Blink can be played as though they were quick schemes.)

name: Gamma Stingray
abilityText: At round end, I deal 3 damage to the opposing lane. (I can damage an empty lane, and I can damage support lanes.)

name: Hyperion Surgemaster
abilityText:
Shifty:
At the start of combat, you may move me by 1 lane in either direction.

When you play a card, if it isn't the main phase, I deal 1 damage to the opposing lane.
(I can damage an empty lane, and I can damage support lanes.)

name: Terra Sunder
abilityText: Up to one chosen lane becomes a support lane for the rest of the game. Then, up to one chosen lane becomes a frontline lane for the rest of the game. (The connected opposing lanes are also affected this way. Creations in support lanes can't attack or be attacked in combat.)

name: Doctors Daz & Vykk
abilityText:
Soaring; Sui Generis:
When we enter, reveal your deck, turn all of your cards with the same name as us to dust, then shuffle.

When we enter, you may plot a scheme that costs 3 or less from your hand. It gains "At the start of combat, play me without paying my cost."
When one of your schemes or creations would deal damage, if it isn't the main phase and you've played two or more cards this phase, it deals an additional 1 damage.

name: Ephemeral
abilityText: Until round end, give a chosen creation Ephemeral and "I can't attack this round. When I turn to dust, return me to your hand." (Creations with Ephemeral turn to dust at round end.)

name: Razzle Dazzle
abilityText: Return one of your chosen creations to your hand, then return another chosen creation to its owner's hand.

name: Motley Troupe Juggler
abilityText: At the end of combat, [bury a creation from your field], and draw a card. If the buried creation had Ephemeral, return that creation to your hand.

name: Bottom of the Barrel
abilityText:
When one of your creations or an opposing creation leaves the field, grant me +1 might and +1 vigor.
When I enter, [bury a creation from your field], and draw a card.

name: Grim Conductor
abilityText:
[Turn a creation from your field to dust]: If this is the first time this ability was used this round, add <soul><eye>. Choose a card name, then reveal the top card of your deck. If the revealed card is the named card, draw it.
This is a quick ability.

name: Motley Circus Ringleader
abilityText:
Ephemeral; Sui Generis:
When I enter, reveal your deck, turn all of your cards with the same name as me to dust, then shuffle.

Your dusted creations that share a name with me have "[<blood>1]: Put me from dust into an open lane."
When I enter, [turn three of your creations with the same name to dust], and create a Kerberros token with 3 might, 3 vigor, and "When I enter, I deal 3 damage to the opposing lane."

name: Landripper
abilityText:
Rampage:
When I deal overkill damage, you may have me attack a chosen creation for that much damage instead. I can deal overkill damage this way.

name: Rampage
abilityText: Until round end, give a chosen creation Rampage and "Creations in the opposing lane have 1 vigor. When they die, the opposing lifestitcher doesn't take overkill damage." (When a creation with Rampage deals overkill damage, you may have that creation attack a chosen creation for that much damage instead. It can deal overkill damage this way.)

name: Idol of the Red Tide
abilityText:
When any of your creations attack, I deal 1 damage to all lanes and creations that creation is attacking.
(Creations with 0 might can still attack in combat.)

name: Duel at the Shoreline
abilityText: Start an additional combat phase, except only two chosen creations whose lanes oppose each other participate. Creations can't deal overkill damage during that combat. (Then the main phase resumes.)

name: Warfare Alliance
abilityText: Until round end, whenever one or more creations attack, look at that many cards from the top of your deck, and you may put any number of them on the top or bottom in any order. Then, if you've looked at five or more cards this way this round, draw two cards.

name: Abyssal Blade Khtllith
abilityText:
Sui Generis:
When I enter, reveal your deck, turn all of your cards with the same name as me to dust, then shuffle.

When I enter, start an additional combat phase. (Then the main phase resumes.)
When I attack, give me Lord until round end. (Multiple instances of Lord stack.)
[<blood>1]: I attack a chosen creation for 1 damage. This is a quick ability. Activate only once each round.

name: Coda Merumana
abilityText:
Unite:
Your creations to my left and right are in a band with me. When a creation in the band would take damage, you may distribute it among all of its bandmates.

name: Unite
abilityText: Until round end, give a chosen creation Unite and +2 vigor. (Your creations to the left and right of creations with Unite are in a band with them. When a creation in the band would take damage, you may distribute it among all of its bandmates.)

name: Coda Sterbaro
abilityText:
Unite:
Your creations to my left and right are in a band with me. When a creation in the band would take damage, you may distribute it among all of its bandmates.

When I or another of your creations would gain might or vigor, until round end, give all other creations in the band an additional point in that stat.

name: Crescendo Aspirant
abilityText: At the start of combat, if I'm in a band, give me and all of my bandmates +1 might and +1 vigor until round end. Otherwise, give me +1 might until round end.

name: Dance as One
abilityText:
Plot this scheme. (In a grave or lane.)
At the start of combat, if this scheme is plotted, [turn it to dust], and choose two of your creations. Until round end, they're in a band, their might and vigor are equal to their total might and vigor divided by two, and they have "Whenever I'm chosen by a scheme or ability, the other creation is also chosen by the same scheme or ability."

name: The Grand Orchestra
abilityText:
Unite; Sui Generis:
When I enter, reveal your deck, turn all of your cards with the same name as me to dust, then shuffle.

I cost <blood>1 less for each of your creations. Creations to my left and right have Unite. At the start of combat, you may set each of your creations' might to the total might among your creations, divided by the total number of your frontline creations, rounded up.

name: Terror in the Ice
abilityText:
Frozen:
I have no other abilities, traits, nor might.
[Turn a card from your hand to dust and pay my cost]: Permanently remove Frozen from me.

name: Frozen
abilityText: Grant a chosen creation Frozen. Its cost becomes <blood>3 until it loses Frozen. (Creations with Frozen have no other abilities, traits, nor might, and have "[Turn a card from your hand to dust and pay my cost]: Permanently remove Frozen from me.")

name: Enforcer of Eternity
abilityText:
When one of your schemes choose another creation, you may give that creation Frozen until round end. (Creations with Frozen have no other abilities, traits, nor might, and have "[Turn a card from your hand to dust and pay my cost]: Permanently remove Frozen from me.")
When a creation loses frozen, you heal 1 and I move to oppose it.

name: Omit
abilityText: A chosen lifestitcher reveals three cards from their hand. Turn one of the revealed cards to dust. (You may choose yourself as a target.)

name: Doomsday Herald
abilityText: When I enter, grant me five instances of Frozen, then my cost becomes <blood>1. (Creations with Frozen have no other abilities, traits, nor might, and have "[Turn a card from your hand to dust and pay my cost]: Permanently remove Frozen from me." Each instance of Frozen must be removed separately.)

name: Archseer Ethera
abilityText:
Neurotic Strength:
I get +1 might for every 4 of your nontoken dusted cards.

Sui Generis:
When I enter, reveal your deck, turn all of your cards with the same name as me to dust, then shuffle.

I can't deal damage to lifestitchers.
[Turn a card from your hand to dust]: Choose a dusted scheme. If that scheme's cost is less than or equal to my might, play that scheme without paying its cost. Use only once each round.

name: Elite Servant
abilityText:
Pristine:
When you harvest me, add one organ from my cost and one organ of any type.

Spend organs of different types to pay for my cost.
When I enter, draw two cards, then bury a creation from your hand or turn a card from your hand to dust.
[<blood>1]: Add one organ of any type. This is a quick ability. Use only once each round.

name: Driver of the Dead
abilityText:
When I attack normally, reveal the top two cards of your corpse deck, put them on the bottom in any order, then perform the following based on those corpses' types.
<heart> Heart Donor - Give all of your frontline creations +1 might until round end.
<brain> Brain Donor - You heal 2.
<soul> Soul Donor - Give a chosen creation +2 might until round end.
<eye> Eye Donor - Draw a card.

name: Leona Regulus, Omniarch
abilityText:
Pristine; Sui Generis:
When I enter, reveal your deck, turn all of your cards with the same name as me to dust, then shuffle.

Corpses in your graves have Pristine.
When you would play a creation onto my lane, it costs <heart><brain><soul><eye> less to play.
[<soul>1]: Give me +1 might until round end.
[<eye>2]: Give me a trait from a chosen creation until round end.
[<brain>3]: Draw two cards.
[<heart>4]: Until round end, all opposing creations have 1 vigor.

name: Departed Gravedigger
abilityText:
(I can be harvested normally to add <blood><blood>.)
[Turn me to dust from your grave]: Bury the top card of your corpse deck.
(This isn't a quick ability.)

name: Fallen Titan
abilityText: When you harvest me, add <blood><blood><blood>.

name: Fuel for the Tide
abilityText: (When you harvest me, add <eye><heart>.)

name: Hyperion Storage Unit
abilityText: (When you harvest me, add <brain><soul>.)

name: Ichor Catalyst
abilityText:
(I can be harvested normally to add <blood><blood>.)
[Turn a card from your hand to dust, and turn me to dust from your grave]: Add <blood><blood><blood><blood>. This is a quick ability.

name: Miasmic Cambion
abilityText:
When you harvest me, add your choice of <blood><blood>, <brain><brain> <soul><soul> or <brain><soul>.
Harvesting me for anything other than <blood><blood> costs 1 life.

name: Miasmic Faithful
abilityText:
When you harvest me, add your choice of <blood><blood>, <heart><heart> <soul><soul> or <heart><soul>.
Harvesting me for anything other than <blood><blood> costs 1 life.

name: Miasmic Mummy
abilityText:
When you harvest me, add your choice of <blood><blood>, <brain><brain> <eye><eye> or <brain><eye>.
Harvesting me for anything other than <blood><blood> costs 1 life.

name: Miasmic Scintilla
abilityText:
When you harvest me, add your choice of <blood><blood>, <soul><soul> <eye><eye> or <soul><eye>.
Harvesting me for anything other than <blood><blood> costs 1 life.

name: Miasmic Terrapin
abilityText:
When you harvest me, add your choice of <blood><blood>, <heart><heart> <brain><brain> or <heart><brain>.
Harvesting me for anything other than <blood><blood> costs 1 life.

name: Miasmic Warrior
abilityText:
When you harvest me, add your choice of <blood><blood>, <eye><eye> <heart><heart> or <eye><heart>.
Harvesting me for anything other than <blood><blood> costs 1 life.

name: Motley Casualty
abilityText: (When you harvest me, add <soul><eye>.)

name: Order Cryopod
abilityText: (When you harvest me, add <brain><eye>.)

name: Regulus Memorial
abilityText:
I can't be harvested normally.
[Turn me to dust from your grave]: Search your corpse deck for any Common Corpse card, bury it, then shuffle.
(This isn't a quick ability.)

name: Victim of the Coda
abilityText: (When you harvest me, add <blood><soul>.)

name: Well of Vitaleum
abilityText: (When you harvest me, add <blood><brain>.)
